home.name: Wang Chunkang
home.subtitle: Building the future of intelligent machines, from low-level firmware to high-level control systems.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: A brief introduction
about.bio1: I'm a robotics engineer passionate about embedded systems, control algorithms, and robot competitions. My work spans from low-level STM32 firmware development to high-level robot control systems using ROS2 and MuJoCo simulation.
about.bio2: As a member of the RoboMaster team, I've developed embedded control frameworks for various robot types including omnidirectional chassis, gimbal systems, and shooting mechanisms. I enjoy bridging the gap between hardware and software.
